arts.ttl: Liverpool given guard of honour by Chelsea after winning Premier League title amid boos
arts.sum: Liverpool have been handed a guard of honour by Chelsea at Stamford Bridge as the Reds play for the first time since being confirmed as the Premier League champions

arts.ttl: Liverpool are given guard of honour by Chelsea after sealing historic league title - but Arne Slot's side are BOOED by Blues fans at Stamford Bridge
arts.sum: Chelsea have given champions Liverpool a guard of honour ahead of their Premier League clash at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Liverpool: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates from Stamford Bridge; kick-off 4.30pm BST Live scores | How they stand | Sign up to Football Daily Get in touch! Email michael.butler@theguardian.com Full-time at the Amex: Brighton 1-1 Newcastle. A decent result for Chelsea, that, with Newcastle dropping points. Diego Gómez missed a sitter to win it for Brighton in the 95th minute. Huge news in the race for the Champions League: Newcastle have found a late equaliser at Brighton, with Alexander Isak converting a penalty kick. That game, now 1-1, is now into stoppage time and you can follow the closing moments here. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Liverpool LIVE: Team news with Premier League champions to receive guard of honour at Stamford Bridge

arts.ttl: Slot Must Play 'Generational' Star v Chelsea, Chiesa's Liverpool Career is Over
arts.sum: Arne Slot must play 'generational' young star Rio Ngumoha instead of £150,000-a-week flop Federico Chiesa in Liverpool's clash with Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Champions League-chasing Chelsea welcome Premier League champions Liverpool to Stamford Bridge this afternoon. In his pre-match press conference, manager Enzo Maresca announced the club’s plan to follow tradition and give the league winners a guard of honour.
